sections.paragraph:
ὑποχθόνιος, (ία), ιον (χθόνιος ‘in or under the earth’) under the earth (Hes. et al.; Posidon.: 87 Fgm. 47 Jac.) οἱ ὑποχθόνιοι the powers under the earth w. οἱ ἐπουράνιοι καὶ ἐπίγειοι (ἐπίγειος 1bβ) ITr 9:1.—DELG s.v. χθών.

Hes Hes , date uncertain, perh. before VI b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Posidon Posidon , II–I b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Jac. Jac. = Die Fragmente der griechischen Historiker, ed. FJacoby—Lists 5, 6

ITr ITr = Ignatius to the Trallians—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1043
